sections.copy:
Welcome to MARDIV CAKES AND CATERING SERVICES

Your trusted partner for exquisite cakes and exceptional catering in Kaduna. From elegant wedding cakes to corporate catering events, we bring sweetness and satisfaction to every celebration.

Order Your Perfect Cake Today
sections.imagePrompt: A beautifully decorated three-tier Nigerian wedding cake with intricate fondant designs in gold and white, displayed on an elegant table with soft natural lighting, professional bakery setting in Kaduna Nigeria, photorealistic, high quality, warm ambiance

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
MARDIV CAKES AND CATERING SERVICES

Located in the heart of Igabi, Kaduna, MARDIV CAKES AND CATERING SERVICES is your premier destination for custom-made cakes and comprehensive catering solutions. We specialize in creating memorable culinary experiences for weddings, birthdays, corporate events, and all special occasions.

Our expert bakers and caterers combine traditional Nigerian flavors with modern techniques to deliver products that not only look stunning but taste absolutely divine. Every cake is baked fresh to order, and every catering menu is tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

With years of experience serving the Kaduna community, we pride ourselves on quality ingredients, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction. Whether you need a simple birthday cake or full-service catering for 500 guests, MARDIV is here to make your event unforgettable.
sections.imagePrompt: A warm, inviting Nigerian bakery kitchen with professional bakers decorating colorful cakes, stainless steel equipment, fresh ingredients on marble countertops, bright natural lighting through windows, Kaduna Nigeria setting, photorealistic, professional food photography

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
What We Offer

Custom Cakes
Wedding cakes, birthday cakes, anniversary cakes, and celebration cakes designed to your exact specifications. Choose from vanilla, chocolate, red velvet, fruit cake, and more. Custom designs, fondant decorations, and edible prints available.

Catering Services
Full-service catering for weddings, corporate events, parties, and social gatherings. Nigerian cuisine, continental dishes, small chops, buffet setups, and service staff available. Customizable menus to suit your budget and guest count.

Small Chops & Pastries
Perfect for meetings, cocktails, and intimate gatherings. Includes puff puff, samosa, spring rolls, chicken wings, mini burgers, fish rolls, and assorted pastries. Fresh, hot, and delivered on time.

Corporate Catering
Professional catering solutions for conferences, seminars, training sessions, and office events. Reliable service, quality food, and timely delivery guaranteed.

Event Planning Support
We work with event planners and venues across Kaduna to ensure seamless coordination. Consultation services available to help you plan the perfect menu.

sections.name: What Our Clients Say
sections.copy:
Client Testimonials

"MARDIV made my wedding cake and it was absolutely stunning! Everyone kept asking where we got it from. The taste was even better than the design. Highly recommended!" - Blessing O., Kaduna

"We've used MARDIV for three corporate events now and they never disappoint. Professional service, delicious food, and always on time. They're our go-to caterers." - Chinedu A., Business Executive

"The best birthday cake my daughter has ever had! MARDIV brought her princess theme to life perfectly. Thank you for making her day special." - Fatima M., Igabi

"Outstanding catering service for our church anniversary. They fed over 300 people with such grace and excellence. God bless MARDIV!" - Pastor John K., Kaduna

sections.name: Contact Us
sections.copy:
Get In Touch With MARDIV

Ready to order your perfect cake or discuss your catering needs? We're here to help make your event exceptional.

Visit Our Location:
#5 Mohammed Kida House opposite TCN Mando Kaduna, Igabi, Nigeria

Call or WhatsApp:
0706 815 7380

Business Hours:
Monday - Saturday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Sunday: By Appointment Only

Note: Please place cake orders at least 72 hours in advance. For large catering events, we recommend booking 2-4 weeks ahead to ensure availability.

We look forward to serving you!
